name: device_filter
description: Results from filtering top candidates based on the user query for downstream intents like command_control and routine_automation.

devices.description: Selected device/group/scene candidates for command_control, routine_automation, real_time_status, and group_scene_operations.

device_id.description: The unique device or group/scene identifier

score.description: Relevance score from 0.0 to 1.0 inclusive (higher is better)
